title: 出货前照片、视频和验货报告
theme: 从 pre-shipment inspection / photo confirmation / shipment release 开始
goals: 能发送出货前照片、视频和验货报告给客户确认
能处理客户对包装、唛头、外箱和产品细节的验货反馈
能在客户确认后推进 shipment release，避免未经确认就出货

review.title: Day 19 复习
items: 昨天练了 rework、reprocessing、recheck、quality control、sorting 和 corrective action。
今天把质量复检衔接到出货前确认：照片、视频、验货报告和客户放行。
出货前不要只说 goods ready，要给客户可确认的证据，并拿到明确 approval 后再放行。

preview.scenario: 货物完成生产和复检后，你需要发送产品照片、包装照片、外箱唛头、视频和验货报告。客户可能要求补拍、修改标签或确认后放行出货。
needToKnow: pre-shipment inspection 是出货前验货，通常发生在包装完成或接近完成时。
photo confirmation 和 video confirmation 能减少客户对质量和包装的疑虑。
shipment release 表示客户确认后可以安排出货，不要在客户未确认时擅自发货。

vocabulary.usage: 用于出货前检查产品、包装、数量和唛头。
vocabulary.example: We have completed the pre-shipment inspection.

vocabulary.usage: 用于汇总验货结果、照片、数量和问题说明。
vocabulary.example: I will send you the inspection report for review.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户通过照片确认产品、包装、唛头或细节。
vocabulary.example: Please check the photos for photo confirmation.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户通过视频确认产品状态、功能、包装或数量。
vocabulary.example: We can send a video confirmation before shipment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于展示单品包装、内盒、外箱和装箱方式。
vocabulary.example: Please find the packing photos attached.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认外箱上的标签内容、条码、SKU 或客户信息。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm if the carton label is correct.

vocabulary.usage: 用于出货前最后一次检查产品和包装。
vocabulary.example: We are doing the final check before shipment.

vocabulary.meaning: 放行出货 / 出货放行
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户确认后允许安排出货。
vocabulary.example: After your approval, we will arrange shipment release.

sentences.label: 发送验货报告
sentences.natural: I will send you the inspection report for review.
sentences.business: I will send you the inspection report, product photos, and packing photos for your review before shipment.

sentences.label: 请求照片确认
sentences.natural: Please check the photos for confirmation.
sentences.business: Please check the product photos, packing photos, and carton label for photo confirmation.

sentences.label: 提供视频确认
sentences.natural: We can send a video confirmation before shipment.
sentences.business: If you need, we can send a video confirmation to show the product details and packing condition before shipment.

sentences.label: 说明最终检查
sentences.natural: We are doing the final check before shipment.
sentences.business: Our quality control team is doing the final check before shipment release.

sentences.label: 确认后放行出货
sentences.natural: After your approval, we will arrange shipment release.
sentences.business: After your photo confirmation and approval, we will arrange shipment release with the warehouse.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太简单，没有给客户照片、报告或包装证据，客户不好确认。
chatAnalysis.better: Please check the photos for confirmation before shipment.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: I will send you the inspection report, product photos, and packing photos for your review before shipment.

chatAnalysis.problem: 不够明确，客户可能不知道要确认外箱标签、唛头还是包装方式。
chatAnalysis.better: Please check if the carton label is correct.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please check the product photos, packing photos, and carton label for photo confirmation.

chatAnalysis.old: we ship after you say ok
chatAnalysis.problem: 能理解，但不够商务，也没有 shipment release 的流程感。
chatAnalysis.better: After your approval, we will arrange shipment release.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After your photo confirmation and approval, we will arrange shipment release with the warehouse.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：发送出货前照片

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The goods are ready. I will send you the product photos and packing photos for review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also send the carton photos.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the carton label photos together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We will confirm after checking them.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：验货报告和视频确认

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Did you finish the pre-shipment inspection?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we have completed the pre-shipment inspection.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send us the report?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send you the inspection report and a video confirmation before shipment.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户发现外箱标签问题

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The carton label looks wrong in the photo.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for checking. Could you please mark the incorrect part?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The SKU number should be updated.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will correct the carton label and send new photos for confirmation before shipment release.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：出货前照片、验货报告和客户放行

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, the goods are ready, and we have completed the pre-shipment inspection.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send us the inspection report first.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send you the inspection report, product photos, and packing photos for review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include close-up photos of the logo.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will include close-up photos of the logo and product finish.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also send a video?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can send a video confirmation to show the product details and packing condition.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What about the carton label?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will send clear photos of the carton label for your confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure the SKU and shipping mark are correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. We will check the SKU, shipping mark, carton quantity, and packing photos carefully.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The product looks good in the first photos.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please also check the packing photos and carton label before shipment release.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I noticed one carton label has an old SKU number.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for pointing it out. We will correct the carton label immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send new photos after correction.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, after correction, we will do the final check and send new photos for confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will this affect the shipment time?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It should not affect the shipment time. The correction is only for the carton label.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. After we approve the new photos, can you release the shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After your photo confirmation and approval, we will arrange shipment release with the warehouse.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not ship before our confirmation.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will wait for your approval before shipment release.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send everything in one message for our records?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the inspection report, product photos, packing photos, video confirmation, and corrected carton label photos together.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: That is helpful. We will review and confirm today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Once we receive your approval, we will arrange shipment release immediately.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们已经完成出货前验货。
exercises.answer: We have completed the pre-shipment inspection.
acceptable: we have completed the pre-shipment inspection
exercises.hint: pre-shipment inspection 是出货前验货。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：goods ready, can ship?
exercises.answer: Please check the inspection report, product photos, and packing photos for your review before shipment.
acceptable: please check the inspection report product photos and packing photos for your review before shipment
i will send you the inspection report product photos and packing photos for your review before shipment
exercises.hint: 出货前要给证据，不要只问 can ship。

exercises.prompt: 填空：After your approval, we will arrange shipment ____.
客户想确认外箱标签，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please check if the carton label is correct.
exercises.answer: Please check if the carton label is correct.
acceptable: please check if the carton label is correct

exercises.prompt: 中译英：如果您需要，我们可以在出货前发送视频确认。
exercises.answer: If you need, we can send a video confirmation before shipment.
acceptable: if you need we can send a video confirmation before shipment
if needed we can send a video confirmation before shipment

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Please do not ship before our confirmation. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Understood. We will wait for your approval before shipment release.
acceptable: understood we will wait for your approval before shipment release
we will wait for your approval before shipment release
exercises.hint: 用 approval 和 shipment release。

homework: 把 pre-shipment inspection、inspection report、photo confirmation、video confirmation、packing photos、carton label、final check、shipment release 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 inspection report、photo confirmation 和 shipment release。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：货物已完成验货，你要发送报告、产品照片、包装照片、外箱标签照片，并等待客户确认后放行。
tomorrow: Day 21 会练付款凭证、到账和财务审核，进入付款和单据沟通阶段。
